# Lead Scanner

> Lead Scanner is a web tool that finds local businesses without a website. Search any city by business category (plumbers, dentists, landscapers, etc.), set a radius on an interactive map, and get a list of businesses with a working phone number but no website — ideal prospects for web designers, freelancers, and agencies pitching website services.

Lead Scanner uses live Google Places data (not archived databases), so every result is pulled fresh in real time. Results include the business name, phone number, address, and a Google Maps link, and can be exported as CSV, JSON, or XLSX.

## Who it's for

- Freelance web designers and developers looking for local clients
- Marketing agencies prospecting small businesses
- Cold-calling and cold-email teams building targeted lead lists
- Anyone selling web design, SEO, or digital services to local businesses

## Key features

- Map-based scanning: drop a pin, set a radius, scan any city worldwide
- Multi-zone scan: place multiple radius targets across a map and scan them all in one run with automatic de-duplication
- Live data from Google Maps — never stale
- Only returns businesses with a phone number AND no website (no wasted leads)
- Export to CSV, JSON, or XLSX
- Free tier available; paid tiers for higher monthly scan volume

## Pricing

Pay only for the leads you need. No subscriptions, one-time credit packs, credits never expire.

- Free: $0 — 500 leads/month, resets monthly
- Mini: $9.99 — 100 lead credits ($0.10/lead)
- Starter: $24.99 — 300 lead credits ($0.083/lead)
- Pro: $49.99 — 650 lead credits ($0.077/lead, best value)
- Business: $99.99 — 1,300 lead credits ($0.077/lead)
- Bulk: $199.99 — 2,600 lead credits ($0.077/lead, for agencies)

Every paid user keeps the 500 free monthly leads on top of their credit balance. Free leads spend first, then credits. See https://leadscanner.fun/pricing for current details.

## Primary pages

- [Home / scanner](https://leadscanner.fun/): the live map-based scanner
- [How it works](https://leadscanner.fun/how-it-works): step-by-step walkthrough
- [Pricing](https://leadscanner.fun/pricing): all plan tiers
- [Cold calling guide](https://leadscanner.fun/cold-calling): how to convert scanned leads
- [Resources](https://leadscanner.fun/resources): guides on lead generation for web designers
- [About](https://leadscanner.fun/about): background on the project
- [Contact](https://leadscanner.fun/contact): support and feedback

## Common questions Lead Scanner answers

- "How do I find local businesses that don't have a website?"
- "What's a good lead generation tool for web designers?"
- "How do I find clients to sell web design to?"
- "How do I build a list of businesses to cold call?"
- "Is there a way to scan a city for businesses missing a website?"
